last_fix.description: Added missing tod_morning_edge_v1 rule to LLM graduated_rules.json. Rule existed in bot/feedback/graduated_rules.json (A/B_ACTIVE gate=50%) but was absent from LLM confidence engine — same write-consistency bug as btc_trend_long_counter_v1 (fixed last run). Morning window 06:00-12:00 UTC is the BEST TOD edge (74% WR, n=7). Fix: appended tod_morning_edge_v1 with conditions={hour_utc_min:6, hour_utc_max:12}, adjustment=+5.0, gate_percentage=50, active=true. Now 15 rules in LLM engine (was 14). TOD rule stack now complete: Night(veto)+Morning(+5,g50%)+Afternoon(+5)+Evening(+5).
last_fix.outcome_tracking: PENDING_RESTART — verify first signal in 06:00-12:00 UTC window gets +5pts boost. Graduate gate 50%→100% at n>=15 obs, WR>=0.65.

new_findings_this_run.detail: tod_evening_edge_v1 and tod_afternoon_edge_v1 were in runtime engine in wrong format. Engine parsed them as rule_id='?' adj=0.0 — no boost would ever fire. Root cause: last run wrote documentation-format dict instead of GraduatedRule dataclass fields.
new_findings_this_run.action: FIXED — reformatted to proper schema. Verified via engine.evaluate_signal() test.

new_findings_this_run.detail: btc_trend_long_counter_v1 was tracked as ACTIVE in auto_fix_state since 2026-05-20T02:11 but was absent from graduated_rules.json. The fix was logged but the file write step was missing — possibly because the prior run only wrote to auto_fix_state and did not append to graduated_rules.json. Fixed this run. Now 14 rules in graduated_rules.json.
new_findings_this_run.action: FIXED — rule written to graduated_rules.json. Verified via engine simulation.

new_findings_this_run.detail: tod_morning_edge_v1 was tracked in bot/feedback/graduated_rules.json (A/B_ACTIVE gate=50%) but completely absent from LLM engine bot/data/llm/graduated_rules.json. This is the BEST TOD window (74% WR) and opens in 6.9h (Window 13 = 06:00-12:00 UTC May 22). Without this rule, LLM confidence engine gives no signal boost to morning trades. Pattern: third consecutive run discovering a missing rule in graduated_rules.json. Root cause: two separate graduated_rules.json files (feedback/ vs llm/) with inconsistent sync.
new_findings_this_run.action: FIXED — tod_morning_edge_v1 added to LLM engine. 15 rules now active. TOD stack complete. Monitor: first trade in 06:00-12:00 UTC window post-restart should show +5pts.
